revision.comment: Auto-generated page
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Wikisource link with icon/doc]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: tsh
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{COinS safe|n}} {{tsh|ws}} This template places a wikisource icon before text, or a link to wikisource, or another template ==Usage== : {{ws | [[s: | ]]}} in ===Parameters=== :|ps=no to omit the trailing "." ==Examples== : {{ws|''[[s:Ecclesiastical History of the English People|]]''}} by Bede would look like (''[[cf.]]'' [[Help:Pipe trick]]): :{{ws|''[[s:Ecclesiastical History of the English People|Ecclesiastical History of the English People]]''}} by Bede : {{ws|''[[s:Ecclesiastical History of the English People|]]''|ps=no}} by Bede would look like: :{{ws|''[[s:Ecclesiastical History of the English People|Ecclesiastical History of the English People]]''|ps=no}} by Bede : {{ws|[[s:Chaffin v. Taylor (116 U.S. 567)|''Chaffin v. Taylor'' (116 U.S. 567)]] ([[United States Supreme Court]])}} would look like (just an example, it's better to use e.g. {{tl|ussc}} or {{tl|cite court}}): :{{ws|[[s:Chaffin v. Taylor (116 U.S. 567)|''Chaffin v. Taylor'' (116 U.S. 567)]] ([[United States Supreme Court]])}} ==See also== * {{tlx|wikisource}}—to create the sidebox * {{tlx|wikisource-inline}}—to create a list of sources on Wikisource among other options * {{tlx|cite wikisource}}—to create a full citation to wikisource * {{tlx|ws2}}—to link to wikisource inline * {{tlx|wikisourcelang}}—to create the sidebox to another wikisource lanaguage * {{tlx|Cite EB1911}}—for 1911 ''Encyclopaedia Britannica'' entries * {{tlx|Cite CE1913}}—for 1913 ''Catholic Encyclopedia'' entries {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikisource link templates|Ws]] }}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing programmatically generated pages
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Wikisource link with icon/doc]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: Mass importing wikipedia categories, not taking histories because these are unused ones and it is kind of obvious where they came from
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Wikisource link with icon/doc]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Wikisource link with icon/doc]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]]

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] to [[Category:pages tagged as Automatic wikipedia redirects in namespace {{subst:NAMESPACE}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Wikisource link with icon/doc]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:pages tagged as Automatic wikipedia redirects in namespace Template]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]]

revision.comment: tagging these as blank templates
revision.text: #[[en:Template:Wikisource link with icon/doc]] [[Category:Pages with blank templates]]<noinclude>[[Category:Blank templates]][[Category:refreshing s 1-26]]</noinclude> [[Category:Pages with blank templates]]<noinclude>[[Category:Blank templates]][[Category:refreshing s 1-26]]</noinclude>[[Category:Pages with blank templates]]<noinclude>[[Category:Blank templates]][[Category:refreshing s 1-26]]</noinclude> [[Category:Pages with blank templates]]<noinclude>[[Category:Blank templates]][[Category:refreshing s 1-26]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:qq-{{subst:NAMESPACE}}]]<noinclude>[[Category:Pages tagged as templates in userspace {{subst:NAMESPACE}}]]</noinclude>[[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: #[[en:Template:Wikisource link with icon/doc]] [[Category:Pages with blank templates]]<noinclude>[[Category:Blank templates]][[Category:refreshing s 1-26]]</noinclude> [[Category:Pages with blank templates]]<noinclude>[[Category:Blank templates]][[Category:refreshing s 1-26]]</noinclude>[[Category:Pages with blank templates]]<noinclude>[[Category:Blank templates]][[Category:refreshing s 1-26]]</noinclude> [[Category:Pages with blank templates]]<noinclude>[[Category:Blank templates]][[Category:refreshing s 1-26]] [[Category:qq-Template]]<noinclude>[[Category:Pages tagged as templates in userspace Template]]</noinclude>[[Category:qq]] </noinclude>

revision.text: #[[en:Template:Wikisource link with icon/doc]] [[Category:Pages with blank templates]]<noinclude>[[Category:Blank templates]][[Category:refreshing s 1-26]]</noinclude> [[Category:Pages with blank templates]]<noinclude>[[Category:Blank templates]][[Category:refreshing s 1-26]]</noinclude>[[Category:Pages with blank templates]]<noinclude>[[Category:Blank templates]][[Category:refreshing s 1-26]]</noinclude> [[Category:Pages with blank templates]]<noinclude>[[Category:Blank templates]][[Category:refreshing s 1-26]] <noinclude>[[Category:Pages tagged as templates in userspace Template]]</noinclude>[[Category:qq]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "Category:Pages with blank templates" to "Category:Erroneous transclusions of {{subst:PAGENAME}}"
revision.text: #[[en:Template:Wikisource link with icon/doc]] [[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Wikisource link with icon/doc]]<noinclude>[[Category:Blank templates]][[Category:refreshing s 1-26]]</noinclude> [[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Wikisource link with icon/doc]]<noinclude>[[Category:Blank templates]][[Category:refreshing s 1-26]]</noinclude>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Wikisource link with icon/doc]]<noinclude>[[Category:Blank templates]][[Category:refreshing s 1-26]]</noinclude> [[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Wikisource link with icon/doc]]<noinclude>[[Category:Blank templates]][[Category:refreshing s 1-26]] <noinclude>[[Category:Pages tagged as templates in userspace Template]]</noinclude>[[Category:11]] </noinclude>

revision.text: #[[en:Template:Wikisource link with icon/doc]] <noinclude></noinclude> <noinclude></noinclude><noinclude></noinclude> <noinclude> <noinclude></noinclude> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text: #[[en:Template:Wikisource link with icon/doc]] <noinclude></noinclude> <noinclude></noinclude><noinclude></noinclude> <noinclude> <noinclude></noinclude> </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: #[[en:Template:Wikisource link with icon/doc]] <noinclude></noinclude> <noinclude></noinclude><noinclude></noinclude> <noinclude> <noinclude></noinclude> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: #[[en:Template:Wikisource link with icon/doc]] <noinclude></noinclude> <noinclude></noinclude><noinclude></noinclude> <noinclude> <noinclude></noinclude> </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23694499169|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: #[[en:Template:Wikisource link with icon/doc]] <noinclude></noinclude> <noinclude></noinclude><noinclude></noinclude> <noinclude> <noinclude></noinclude> </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
#[[en:Template:Wikisource link with icon/doc]] <noinclude></noinclude><noinclude> <noinclude></noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
